creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
Hello,

Something went wrong during the update of efl and enlightenment ports.
The ports content is NOT the same as on my server.
For the both ports the subdirectory 'files' is present, but IT SHOULD NOT.
For the enlightenment port the file Makefile.plist is present, but IT SHOULD NOT.

There is a small bug in enlightenment port (my error) that prevents correct package build on not x64 architectures. I'm going to fix it.
